expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config and reads/edits it

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Uses NOTION_TOKEN as the variable name

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Shows 'source ~/scripts/ecosystem.env' line for ~/.zshrc and 'source ~/.zshrc' to reload

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Explains credentials are managed through ecosystem.env rather than individual exports in shell profile

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: Shows cp command to copy ecosystem.env.example as a template
